summary: A WBAL-TV 'Developing Story' news segment featuring an interview and airport B-roll about TSA officers in Baltimore working without pay during the shutdown, facing evictions and repossessions. Standard local-news report with chyrons and an interview subject; no music or stylized production.
notable_text: WBAL-TV 'DEVELOPING STORY'; on-screen 'Baggage Claim / Proceed to Lower Level'
